Fields.Name: Shop Type
Fields.Description: The type of shop this row belongs to.

Fields.Name: Equipment Type
Fields.Description: The type of equipment the sold item is.

Fields.Name: Item ID
Fields.Description: The item ID that is sold.

Fields.Name: Sale Price
Fields.Description: The cost of item sold. Overrides the sellValue in item's row.

Fields.Name: Material ID
Fields.Description: The material cost when purchasing an item, or equipping a spell.

Fields.Name: Stock Flag ID
Fields.Description: The ID of an 8-bit event value that stores sold item quantity. Used for any items that are not sold infinitely.

Fields.Name: Quantity
Fields.Description: The maximum amount of items that can be sold. -1 for infinite. Requires an eventFlag for quantity sold to be saved.

Fields.Name: World Tendency ID
Fields.Description: Demon's Souls leftover. Probably doesn't work.
